sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26445" key="*didumw/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Δῐδῠμών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶνος</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ὁ</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μήν</foreign>), name of month at Alexandria, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.7</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
